content.en:
"Star Demon Source Ancestor, you killed too much, slaughtered so many forces, you deserve to die!"

The Infinite Ice Ancestor appeared.

She was a woman, dressed in crystal clear armor, and ice crystals were suspended around her, and those ice crystals were not real ice crystals, but the eternal origin weapon, the Infinite Smoothie!

"Infinite Ice Ancestor, aren't you afraid of the existence of the Eternal Realm behind me? Moreover, you obviously had time to stop me just now, but instead of stopping me, you set up a large array. I want to ask, is there any hatred between us?" the Star Demon Origin Ancestor asked.

"You killed Lanyue!"

Wuji Ice Ancestor said coldly.

"Lanyue Yuanzu, do you have a relationship with her?"

The Star Demon Origin Ancestor was stunned.

How could the Lanyue Origin Ancestor have anything to do with the Wuji Ice Ancestor? Why didn't you say it in the first place?

No.

Even if Lanyue Yuanzu said it at the beginning, he wouldn't believe it, he only thought that Lanyue Yuanzu deliberately said it in order to save his life.

Moreover, in order to hide his identity, it is impossible for him to listen to what Lanyue Yuanzu says, and he will not delay a little time, and what Lanyue Yuanzu says is equivalent to useless.

It is precisely because of this that Lanyue Yuanzu did not say it.

"Lanyue is my junior, I have never revealed it, and besides, I am only bent on impacting the Eternal Realm, so I don't care much about Lanyue. Originally, I thought that Lanyue's strength was also a powerful half-step Eternal Realm, and he didn't fight, so there should be no danger in the Source Sea, so he didn't have to rely on my strength. But I never thought that you would kill her. "

The Infinite Ice Ancestor was extremely angry.

She just retreated for a long time, and suddenly felt that her junior Lanyue had fallen and died, and then she woke up and got out of the pass.

After leaving the customs, I learned that it was the Star Demon Source Ancestor who killed Lanyue.

In order to kill the wrong person, she didn't do it immediately, but stared at Star Demon Mountain.

As a result, the Star Demon Origin Ancestor made another move, she determined the goal, but she didn't bother to save the Ancient Divine Palace, but chose to directly arrange the killing array in the area of the Ancient Divine Palace.

This time, she must kill the Star Demon Ancestor.

"Kill!"

Urged by the infinite smoothie, the time and space in this area were directly shattered, and the half-step Eternal Realm finally couldn't support it, and one by one's bodies shattered and died, leaving only the Star Demon Source Ancestor alone.

The Star Demon Origin Ancestor didn't have time to feel sorry for the fall of these half-step Eternal Realms, if he couldn't escape today, he would have to die.

Bang!!!

The protection of the Star Demon Origin Ancestor shattered inch by inch.

And the infinite smoothie turned into a sword, piercing through it.

No matter how the Star Demon Origin Ancestor defended, he was still pierced by a blow, and the injured position still had a tendency to freeze, even if his recovery power was terrifying, but the injured position was still crushing hundreds of millions of times with every breath.

"Run!"

The Star Demon Origin Ancestor didn't want to fight the Infinite Ice Ancestor.

The other party is a half-step Eternal Realm at the level of the Seven Extremes Realm, and he is only in the Three Tribulations Extreme Realm, and the difference in strength between the two sides is very large.

And as one of the six extreme realm powerhouses in the source sea, he also has a lot of hole cards, and he has no hope of winning.

Suddenly.

The Star Demon Origin Ancestor urged the Space-Time Hengsha Bead to narrow down the scope of suppression, wanting to suppress the Infinite Ice Ancestor, so as to create hope for himself to escape.

However, after all, the Space-Time Sand Bead was only the lowest-level Eternal Origin weapon.

In just one breath, the space-time Hengsha Bead was shattered by the Infinite Ice Ancestor.

In the sea of sources.

The Star Demon Origin Ancestor kept fleeing, while the Infinite Ice Ancestor kept chasing and killing.

At this time, the countless forces in the entire Source Sea knew about the Star Demon Origin Ancestor being hunted down, and they were extremely shocked.

......

"The Star Demon Origin Ancestor was hunted down by the Infinite Ice Ancestor?"

Ye Tian was really surprised to learn this news.

He still thought that there was no half-step Eternal Realm to kill the Star Demon Source Ancestor, but he didn't expect that a strong person would do it so soon.

Ye Tian didn't know much about the Infinite Ice Ancestor, he only knew that the other party was one of the powerhouses of the Six Extreme Realms of the Source Sea.

These six Extreme Realm powerhouses are basically the existence of the Seven-Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm, and some may have reached the level of the Eight-Extreme Realm, but they do not have the half-step Eternal Realm of the Nine-Extreme Realm.

These six Extreme Realm powerhouses all wanted to try to break through the Eternal Realm.

However, there is no need to correlate with the strength of strength and breaking through to become an Eternal Realm, some weak half-step Eternal Realms can break through, while a half-step Eternal Realm like Wuji Ice Ancestor is a little difficult to break through.

However, once such a half-step Eternal Realm breaks through, after becoming an Eternal Realm, the strength will be extremely terrifying.

Time passed slowly, and many half-step Eternal Realms in the Source Sea were paying attention to the fate of the Star Demon Origin Ancestor.

Although there is an Eternal Realm existence behind the Star Demon Origin Ancestor, it is not certain whether that Eternal Realm existence can come.

Moreover, they could barely contact the Eternal Realm, and the Star Demon Origin Ancestor must have been the same.

Perhaps, the Star Demon Origin Ancestor was killed, and the Eternal Realm didn't even know about it.

However, after all, the Star Demon Origin Ancestor is a powerhouse of the Three-Pole Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm, and if the Seven-Pole Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm wants to kill the Three-Pole Realm and the Half-Step Eternal Realm, it will take a little time, and it is not something that can be killed in seconds with one move.

......

The source sea is in the ruins of time and space.

The Star Demon Origin Ancestor was frozen all over his body, and his injuries were already extremely serious.

After all, this place is covered in infinite smoothies and is completely locked down.

Many of the treasures of the Star Demon Source Ancestor had been used, and in addition, the injuries were serious, so he couldn't break through and leave.

"Wuji Ice Ancestor, do you really want to kill me? If you kill me, my disciple, the Spirit Crane Lord of the Eternal Realm will not let you go, you are already a Seven Extremes Realm existence, and your future is unlimited, there is no need to be killed by the Eternal Realm because of this. "

Star Demon Source Ancestor persuaded.

"Even if you are hunted down by the Eternal Realm, I will kill you!"

Wuji Ice Ancestor said angrily.

And all around, there was also a half-step Eternal Realm's gaze, as if he was watching the excitement.

And the Star Demon Origin Ancestor knew that he couldn't persuade the Infinite Ice Ancestor, and he was afraid that he wouldn't be able to wait for the arrival of the Spirit Crane Lord in time, so he could only ask for help from the half-step Eternal Realm that was looking around.

"Whoever saves me will be able to get the friendship of the Spirit Crane Lord, and even the guidance of the Spirit Crane Lord!" the voice of the Star Demon Origin Ancestor spread throughout the surrounding territory.

However, no one helped.

Who dares to offend the Wuji Ice Ancestor, looking for death?

Unless it is the other five who are also powerhouses of the six extreme realms, but these powerhouses don't care about the guidance of the Spirit Crane Lord at all, and the Spirit Crane Lord can't give guidance at all.

Soon.

The body of the Star Demon Origin Ancestor was pierced by the Infinite Smoothie again and again, and the speed of ice crystallization in the body became faster and faster, and the seriously injured Star Demon Origin Ancestor could not recover from his injuries at all.

After a long time, the Star Demon Origin Ancestor was finally unable to resist, and his body was completely crystallized by ice.

Then, with a crisp sound, the Star Demon Origin Ancestor completely shattered into countless powders, and his vitality and consciousness completely dissipated.

At this point, the Star Demon Origin Ancestor fell and died.

And at this moment, a terrifying aura was transmitted.

Eternal Realm Existence is here!
